project_name: AGI × Xiaohongshu — AI-Powered Content Creation Ecosystem

overall_coverage.scan_strategy: Phase A (inventory) + Phase B (priority scanning) completed; Phase C (deep dive) partially completed for critical modules

modules.name: xiaohongshu-cli
modules.description: Complete Xiaohongshu API client & CLI tool with reverse-engineered endpoints, anti-detection, and structured output

layers: Client Layer (client.py + client_mixins.py) — HTTP transport, signing, retry, rate limit, anti-detection
Signing Subsystem (signing.py + creator_signing.py) — Request signature generation
Session Management (cookies.py) — Cookie extraction, TTL, xsec_token cache
Command Layer (xhs_cli/commands/) — CLI commands for auth, reading, interactions, creator, social, notifications
Output Formatting (formatter*.py) — Rich rendering, YAML/JSON envelope, data normalization

key_features: Full CLI command suite (search, read, like, favorite, comment, post, delete, notifications)
Anti-detection (macOS Chrome fingerprint, Gaussian jitter, verify cooldown, exponential backoff)
Structured YAML/JSON output for AI agents
Short-index navigation (xhs read 1, xhs like 1, etc)

dependencies.runtime: httpx, click, rich, browser-cookie3, pycryptodome, xhshow, PyYAML, qrcode, camoufox

unit_tests: test_client.py — HTTP client, retry, rate limit

api_endpoints.interactions: like, favorite, unfavorite, comment, reply, delete-comment
api_endpoints.creator: post, my-notes, delete

modules.name: ohmyxhs
modules.description: Xiaohongshu content strategy master AI skill — automates generation of compliant, high-engagement notes for 15+ product categories

key_files_found: SKILL.md — Complete content strategy guide (~4000 words)
gaps: Detailed case examples for finance, realestate, pet products

core_capabilities: 5-module content generation: Strategy, Strategy Details (6 dimensions), Titles & Keywords, Visual Design, Script
Compliance checking: Banned words, medical implications, overstatement, false endorsements

15+ product categories with risk levels: Low (3C, food, lifestyle), Medium (beauty, skincare, education), High (mother-baby, fitness), Super-High (medical devices, medical beauty, finance, real estate)

output_modules.content_strategy: 6 dimensions: problem insight, audience segmentation, emotional triggers, theme & character, tone & style, value anchor
output_modules.titles_keywords: 3 title options (precision-search, solution, suspense) + keyword matrix (core, long-tail, scenario)
output_modules.visual_design: Composition, color, core elements, filter suggestions (Japanese, creamy, film-noir)
output_modules.content_script: PAS-logic text (introduction, main body with structure, CTA) or 5-shot video storyboard

content_strategy_dimensions.problem_insight: One-sentence pain point in specific scenario
content_strategy_dimensions.audience_segmentation: Age, occupation, life scenario, pain, purchasing power, aesthetic preference
content_strategy_dimensions.value_anchor: Solution or insight, not just product features

banned_words.absolutes: Best, first, only, top → beloved, popular
banned_words.medical_implications: Fix, regenerate, activate, remove, cure → improve, brighten, nourish, soothe
banned_words.overstatement: One-night effect, immediate results, 100% effective → few weeks, persistent use, gradual improvement
banned_words.false_endorsement: Doctor recommended (without evidence) → user recommended, high rating

high_risk_words.effective: reportedly, per user feedback, many share → 'reportedly many users share good results'
high_risk_words.improve_mitigate: may, help, auxiliary, with proper use → 'persistent use may help improve'
high_risk_words.enhance_increase: to some extent, relatively → 'to some extent can enhance'
high_risk_words.suitable: possibly, most people, majority → 'generally suitable for most skin types'

category_guidelines.beauty: Emphasize modification effect, fast result; avoid 'permanent', 'cure'
category_guidelines.skincare: Emphasize real testing, trust-building; avoid medical terms, absolutes
category_guidelines.3c: Emphasize use case, life change; avoid false specs
category_guidelines.food: Emphasize experience and atmosphere; avoid health claims
category_guidelines.mother_baby: Emphasize safety, comfort, science; avoid medical claims
category_guidelines.fitness: Emphasize exercise effect, body feel; avoid direct 'weight loss' claims
category_guidelines.medical_devices: Emphasize user experience, non-medical attributes; never promise medical benefits
category_guidelines.medical_beauty: Emphasize professional experience, peace of mind, community feedback; no effect promises
category_guidelines.finance: Emphasize financial education, risk awareness; no return promises
category_guidelines.real_estate: Emphasize living experience, lifestyle; no appreciation promises

compact_mode.output: Strategy summary + core content strategy + 3 titles + core keywords
compact_mode.recommendation: For quick validation or tight timelines

workflow_1_research: Analyze trending notes, keywords, engagement patterns
Feed insights into ohmyxhs for content planning

information_collection: Mandatory: Product name, core features (2-3), target audience
Recommended: Price range, content angle, persona adjustments, taboo words, format preference
best_practices.mode_selection: User input completeness > 80% → Full mode; 50-80% → Compact + survey; < 50% → Diagnostic + iterative
publication_checklist: 1️⃣ Compliance review (banned words, medical implications, overstatement)
2️⃣ Brand tone alignment (adjust persona/language if needed)
3️⃣ Local test (post on test account, monitor 1-3 days)

qa_common_questions.can_publish_directly: Yes, but recommend 2-3 iteration rounds: compliance check → tone adjustment → local test
qa_common_questions.handling_banned_words: 1) Manual replacement 2) Re-generate with explicit taboo list 3) Consult platform rules
qa_common_questions.title_quantity: Base 3, can request 'give me 5 more title ideas' → usually 8-10 candidates
qa_common_questions.multi_language: Currently Chinese-only. Cross-platform content requires separate adjustments

sections: External Interfaces (CLI Commands, Client API, Data Structures)
External Interfaces (3 Modes, 6 Dimensions, Title Templates, Keyword Matrix)
Risk Management (Banned Words, High-Risk Words, Category Matrix)

xiaohongshu_cli_layers.responsibility: HTTP transport, request signing, retry & rate limiting, anti-detection
x-s / x-s-common / x-t signature generation, session management

xiaohongshu_cli_layers.responsibility: Rich rendering, YAML/JSON envelope, data normalization

ohmyxhs_logic: Category risk evaluation → Compliance framework application
Visual design guidance + content script generation

high_priority.reason: Identified but not deeply scanned; used for note detail extraction
Complex multi-endpoint handling; partial scan only (~50%)

medium_priority.reason: Image upload & post validation edge cases not fully documented
Finance, real estate, pet product examples incomplete

low_priority.reason: GitHub Actions setup present but not deeply analyzed
Some edge cases in error handling not fully tested

priority_1_high: Generate module-level documentation for command submodules (reading.py, creator.py, interactions.py) — Critical for AI agent development
Supplement HTML parser documentation with detailed data structure examples — Important for note parsing
Create integration test guide for developers — Needed for new feature development
priority_2_medium: Expand ohmyxhs case library with finance/real estate/pet product examples — Improves compliance coverage
Document anti-detection mechanism tuning guide — Reduces trigger rate for large-scale usage
Create API endpoint reference catalog with request/response examples — Facilitates AI agent integration
priority_3_low: Add CI/CD pipeline documentation — For fork/deployment maintenance
Supplement error boundary test cases — Quality improvement
Create performance benchmark suite — For optimization tracking

next_scan_triggers: New module addition to root directory
API endpoint changes or new command addition
